Cyclepoint GAMM Bootstrap Analysis

Load Packages

library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(ggplot2)
library(mgcv)
## Loading required package: nlme
## 
## Attaching package: 'nlme'
## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     collapse
## This is mgcv 1.9-3. For overview type 'help("mgcv-package")'.
library(gamm4)
## Loading required package: Matrix
## Loading required package: lme4
## 
## Attaching package: 'lme4'
## The following object is masked from 'package:nlme':
## 
##     lmList
## This is gamm4 0.2-7
library(ggeffects)
library(patchwork)
library(see)
select <- dplyr::select

Load Data

behdat <- read.csv("behdat.csv")

behdat$type <- factor(
  behdat$type,
  levels = c('Prototype', 'RuleFollower', 'Exception')
)

Full Interaction Model

cyc <- paste('cyclepoint [', toString(seq(0.0, 1.0, by = 0.01)), ']')

mg <- gamm4(
  meanAccLB ~ 
    s(cyclepoint, bs = 'cc') +
    s(cyclepoint, bs = 'cc', by = type) +
    type,
  random = ~(1 | randomID),
  data = behdat
)

plot(ggpredict(mg$gam, terms = c(cyc, 'type')))

summary(mg$gam)
## 
## Family: gaussian 
## Link function: identity 
## 
## Formula:
## meanAccLB ~ s(cyclepoint, bs = "cc") + s(cyclepoint, bs = "cc", 
##     by = type) + type
## 
## Parametric coefficients:
##                  Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)       0.88138    0.01556   56.64   <2e-16 ***
## typeRuleFollower -0.19445    0.01774  -10.96   <2e-16 ***
## typeException    -0.28978    0.01774  -16.34   <2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Approximate significance of smooth terms:
##                                      edf Ref.df     F  p-value    
## s(cyclepoint)                  1.268e+00      8 12.27 0.054109 .  
## s(cyclepoint):typePrototype    1.132e-07      8  0.00 1.000000    
## s(cyclepoint):typeRuleFollower 1.132e-07      8  0.00 1.000000    
## s(cyclepoint):typeException    2.969e+00      8 87.62 0.000372 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## R-sq.(adj) =   0.37   
## lmer.REML = -273.45  Scale est. = 0.017934  n = 342

Bootstrap Resampling

Resampling Function

boot_fcn <- function() {
  n <- dim(behdat)[1]
  sbjs <- unique(behdat$randomID)
  exc_sbj <- sbjs[sample(length(sbjs), 1)]

  boot_df <- slice_sample(
    filter(behdat, randomID != exc_sbj),
    n = n,
    replace = TRUE
  )

  tmp <- gamm4(
    meanAccLB ~
      s(cyclepoint, bs = 'cc') +
      s(cyclepoint, bs = 'cc', by = type) +
      type,
    random = ~(1 | randomID),
    data = boot_df
  )

  d <- as_tibble(ggpredict(tmp$gam, terms = c(cyc, 'type')))
  s <- summary(tmp$gam)$s.table

  s2 <- as_tibble(s) %>% 
    rename(p = `p-value`)
  s2$factor <- row.names(s)

  return(list(d, s2))
}

Run bootstrap

nboot <- 1000
boot_prd <- NULL
boot_summary <- NULL

for (r in 1:nboot) {
  if (r %% 100 == 0) cat(paste('..', r, sep = ''))

  res <- boot_fcn()

  prd <- res[[1]]
  prd$rep <- r
  boot_prd <- rbind(boot_prd, prd)

  eff <- res[[2]]
  eff$rep <- r
  boot_summary <- rbind(boot_summary, eff)
}
## ..100..200..300..400..500..600..700..800..900..1000

Plot EDF

boot_edf <- boot_summary %>%
  group_by(factor) %>%
  summarise(
    med = median(edf),
    lower = quantile(edf, 0.025),
    upper = quantile(edf, 0.975),
    p_nonlin = mean(edf <= 1)
  )

ggplot(boot_edf, aes(x = factor, y = med)) +
  geom_violindot(
    data = boot_summary,
    aes(x = factor, y = edf),
    alpha = 0.05
  ) +
  geom_point2(size = 4) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 'dotted') +
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c('cycle', 'exception', 'prototype', 'rule follower')
  ) +
  ylab('EDF') +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())

Bootstrap prediction plots

p1 <- boot_prd %>%
  group_by(x, group) %>%
  summarise(
    ymin = quantile(predicted, 0.025),
    ymax = quantile(predicted, 0.975),
    y = median(predicted)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, colour = group)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = 'dotted', size = 0.25) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = group),
    alpha = 0.25, colour = NA
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(x = 'cyclepoint', y = 'p(correct)') +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = 'none')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'x'. You can override using the `.groups`
## argument.
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
p2 <- boot_prd %>%
  group_by(x, group) %>%
  summarise(
    ymin = quantile(predicted, 0.025),
    ymax = quantile(predicted, 0.975),
    y = median(predicted)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, colour = group)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = 'dotted', size = 0.25) +
  geom_line(
    data = boot_prd,
    aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group,
        group = interaction(group, rep)),
    alpha = 0.02
  ) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  labs(x = 'cyclepoint', y = 'p(correct)') +
  theme_classic()
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'x'. You can override using the `.groups`
## argument.
p1 + p2

Final result

p <- boot_prd %>%
  group_by(x, group) %>%
  summarise(
    ymin = quantile(predicted, 0.025),
    ymax = quantile(predicted, 0.975),
    y = median(predicted)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, colour = group)) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0.5,
    linetype = 'dotted',
    size = 0.25,
    colour = 'grey50'
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.28, linetype = 'solid', alpha = 0.25, size = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.61, linetype = 'solid', alpha = 0.25, size = 0.25) +
  annotate('text', x = 0.14, y = 0.35, label = 'EF', size = 3) +
  annotate('text', x = 0.44, y = 0.35, label = 'LF/PO', size = 3) +
  annotate('text', x = 0.78, y = 0.35, label = 'ML', size = 3) +
  geom_line(
    data = boot_prd,
    alpha = 0.02,
    size = 0.25,
    aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group,
        group = interaction(group, rep))
  ) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  labs(x = 'standardized point in cycle', y = 'test accuracy') +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0.3, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(
    option = 'viridis',
    end = 0.8,
    labels = c('prototype', 'rule follower', 'exception')
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(
    option = 'viridis',
    end = 0.8,
    labels = c('prototype', 'rule follower', 'exception')
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_line(size = 0.5),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = 'top',
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.margin = margin(t = 0, unit = 'cm'),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0, 'mm'),
    legend.key.size = unit(4, 'mm')
  )
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'x'. You can override using the `.groups`
## argument.
## Warning: The `size` argument of `element_line()` is deprecated as of ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use the `linewidth` argument instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
p
